title: Mario Composer: Mario 64 - Ultimate Koopa
description: Thought I'd try something different from the usual. I think it turned out alright. There were a few pitch anomalies that I just couldn't fix, but I like how it finished. Improvised on some parts because the abilities of mario composer don't quite meet the standards of this epic song. Sorry to disappoint those looking for a humor, this was more of a serious project.
